Today, KNC has 12 flourishing departments offering courses in the Humanities, Social Sciences.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOwwmOUBn_-BYyZhLGvd7zX1JUU2qYPymygdj4Q&fid=0x0:0xef3a70a01bb79361"],"When":"2021-5-11"},{"Name":"Pinky M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKZixYCeQnuJ3kgx6JoFo0b5fltpsGONL_noN6jOn0DWtLGsAO=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worse time table ever, being a day scholar it feels like we're evening scholar, moreover early classes started from 9:00AM which is not fine if the college is conducting the classes till the evening 5:30PM if that's so then classes should have started late as well.just imagine ,and the gap between the classes are about 2 hours which is insane","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Akansha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeXEv_Sx5zbhkq4VkenwJmG5Dw1QjoH6DfJ9lUOnxX9Lq0puWFvw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good campus area with old infrastructure which highlights it's old beauty. Been in existence for over 50 years. The institution was founded in 1964as an all-women college. better human beings. The vision of KNC is to provide a transformative education to young women thereby leading to the growth and development of an egalitarian society. The college named after one of the women visionaries of modern India, it reflects the essence of a free nation. The college aims to nurture unbiased women citizens and to promote quality education.

In total, the Kamala Nehru College has  26 courses including the certificate and diploma courses. The college follows the choice based credit system, which allows the students in choosing the subjects that they want to study, along with their core subjects. This system basically allocates the various subjects and project/dissertations into their own category of electives that need to be completed. The college has the freedom to choose some of the subjects that they want to provide to the students. The students have freedom of choosing their subjects from a pool of various different types of subjects. Like other Delhi University colleges, Kamala Nehru College also provides reservation for SC/ST and OBC as per the university rules and regulations. The college has a total of 1600 seats.

Kamala Nehru College, New Delhi, has various clubs and societies for the overall development of the students. Some of the societies currently present in the college eco-club, film club, dance clubs for both western and Indian styles, creative writing clubs and debating clubs in both Hindi and English language, photography, fashion and choreography clubs, and the likes.

Among facilities, Kamala Nehru College has modern classrooms, science labs, canteen, gymnasium, computer centre, seminar room and an auditorium. The placement records of the college are equally impressive with students bagging both national and international offers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMEQAhE3syYv5PVPFMpUwe6OXyA5XHA4A8X2y8H&fid=0x0:0xef3a70a01bb79361"],"When":"2019-4-19"},{"Name":"Preesha Bhatia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQnJWOqzVLh-tPWHVCnISAyw7hrqHhyLnlfm4hmBBOiJqHZ3c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"♿️ Wheelchair accessible ramps for entry, but not accesible for higher floors and auditorium.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The administrator of the college is very hard working and dedicated to their work. The infrastructure of the college is getting better day by day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipObNLLmlou1LlKJpwVopBbQ4oZTd7O1yKyD0MqQ&fid=0x0:0xe728c244a124a4"],"When":"2024-3-5"},{"Name":"Shubhankar Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWa167Z9f8oGMe6_778f-bIfqoqnuqttjo96Q4Xj8fDw2ckz_Csbw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Choosing a college is a life-changing decision, and with the vibrant options on South Campus, it can feel overwhelming. But allow me to introduce you to a hidden gem – Shaheed Bhagat Singh College (SBSC).

A Legacy Rooted in Freedom:

Established in 1967, SBSC honors the legacy of the iconic revolutionary, Shaheed Bhagat Singh. Upholding his ideals of justice and intellectual pursuit, the college fosters a culture of academic excellence within its serene South Delhi campus. Here, you'll find the perfect balance between rigorous academics and a nurturing community spirit.

Beyond the Metro Mayhem:

Unlike some South Campus colleges, SBSC offers a welcome escape from the daily metro rush. Forget the long queues at Durgabai Deshmukh station! SBSC's location allows for a relaxed commute to nearby stations like Chirag Delhi, Panchsheel Park, or Greater Kailash. This translates to less stress and more time to delve into your studies and explore campus life.

A Culinary Delight:

Step into the SBSC canteen, and prepare to have your taste buds tantalized. Renowned for its superior quality and diverse offerings, the food consistently outshines even the canteens of Moti Lal Nehru College and Ram Lal Anand College. From comforting Indian dishes to international delights, SBSC's canteen caters to every palate, ensuring a satisfying and enjoyable dining experience.

Intellectual Powerhouse:

SBSC fosters a vibrant intellectual environment. The student body here is known for its sharp minds and articulate nature. Engaging in conversations with your peers, you'll discover a passion for learning and a drive to excel. These interactions not only enrich your understanding but also prepare you to confidently represent SBSC in any intellectual forum.

Considering All Aspects:

Just like any institution, SBSC has its own strengths and weaknesses. While it shines in terms of manageable commutes, top-notch dining options, and an intellectually stimulating environment, it's important to conduct your own research to determine if it aligns with your academic and social aspirations.

The Final Verdict:

Shaheed Bhagat Singh College is an exceptional institution that deserves serious consideration. Explore its diverse academic programs, delve deeper into its unique culture, and make an informed decision. Remember, the perfect college is the one that best reflects your individual goals and aspirations.

Thank you for reading! I wish you all the best in your college selection process.

P.S.  While this review focuses on the general strengths of SBSC, it's important to  research the specific courses offered by the college to see if they align with your academic interests.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOWg05jeFTA7xkGAsAOO4Zi0sOnUx8sSWWNqdif&fid=0x0:0xe728c244a124a4"],"When":"2023-3-20"},{"Name":"Gabbar Battalion","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6FB-dyr7rhPfJd9RNS0xXGT4axVkscTayA2Y-XUcKx-f0YHmK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"condition of the college is so bad, structural repairing required, no cleanliness.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPdsB-jg_Qxl0JwvwCKZX3zoM_xbI7Hr9fZQSOb&fid=0x0:0xe728c244a124a4"],"When":"2024-9-8"},{"Name":"Prashant Kumar Mishra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOq8TWCJ0G1DCr6WaC0jNxisYbjjQKjNKp-BwQN6F8LXDfsgEJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Shaheed Bhagat Singh College is a co-ed  institute which was established in 1967.

[{"Name":"Dravyansh Patel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeeordKshInE0pwf3G9OClP0OOZYQPIZ7GbRAjk0RM2s0gjTZ5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The college has a lush green campus. It is adjacent to the South Campus of the University of Delhi in the surroundings of the South Delhi section of the Aravalli Range. The Campus consists of two blocks - Kusumpur and Taregana with classrooms, auditorium and a seminar room. The college maintains a playground for sports. Various games like volleyball, cricket, football, kabaddi are organised under the supervision of the Director of Physical Education. The college has a well-equipped computer lab, NCC and NSS rooms, silent study hall, students' utility centre, girls common room and photocopier. The college also has a newly constructed double-storied canteen.

The college has a library. The library is open to bonafide students of all classes. All important textbooks are kept in the reserve section to enable students to write their tutorials. It has more than one lakh books and 2000+ eJournals. There is a reading room, which subscribes to many dailies, weeklies, periodicals and journals on a variety of subjects. The college library also provides a facility of Book Bank to the economically weaker members of the college.

At present, the college does not provide hostel accommodation to its students. However, many private accommodations are available in the vicinity of the college.

Every department has its own society which is tasked with organising the department-specific co-curricular activities.

A number of student societies function in the college. There are 21 societies and cells active in the college.[3] The purpose of these societies is to provide opportunities to students for self-expression and training. They also help in all-around development lege also hosts and conducts seminars, debates, cultural programmes etc. to encourage creative activities among the students.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPvfw700VpxPSf-WDcEEpg_sU5uy4gf5qCXX_4M&fid=0x0:0x17699e9de4def852"],"When":"2024-8-5"},{"Name":"Shubham Bhakta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwhdU80YPQp6QDjQBYkEVoKfnkv3oDc3OHXlfHf1s8A5DO0_IW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am pursuing Computer Science hons from here. [{"Name":"Ashish Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWN4wo_AfPNVj8knLMuh21D8wVuq0Q24hsVeK9HZ6dVI2Z1ssnF=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"CVS is a very good college under Delhi university. CVS have a creme layer and top notch students crowd and multiple societies which help in building a overall growth.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOeHOqTWNW6GYsE75Vtv_Op8E_Xv8nucNzzvEH3&fid=0x0:0x7da5055b4b6beb02"],"When":"2022-7-15"},{"Name":"Anuj Pal Goswami","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUClUl8vBrH_9H-AGoDSmG-0EbaebldEcsoBasPha2KOlmEMIED=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dear readers,
I visited this college for campus recruitment and I found the students very brilliant, active, passionate and through professional. I would rate my visit and experience in CVS as best and recommend companies to visit evey year. More about college is mentioned below.
The College of Vocational Studies (CVS) is co-ed college of the University of Delhi. It is a co-educational college founded in 1972 with emphasis on vocational education to bridge the gap between traditional university education, through courses in French, German and Spanish languages, Post Graduate Diploma in Tourism and Post Graduate Diploma in Book Publishing.

The college is situated in the heart of Delhi at Sheikh Sarai-II, next to Shaheed Bhagat Singh College. The nearest metro stations are Chirag Delhi and Malviya Nagar. It is at back of PSRI hospital and Select Citywalk.
College has a very beautiful conference hall. Canteen, amphitheatre, Bamboo room, computer lab and rich library.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPeHL5v6QGVcqvVMK6SY4H1Vtr9K6Tlskr1U-JN&fid=0x0:0x7da5055b4b6beb02"],"When":"2022-3-30"},{"Name":"Neeraj Bidhuri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6TmIe52vTLoBqqeBsdf1b3Ke2etV5q6RyOixmfp9hPIrb6bL1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"•The College is one of the centers for conducting English Language Proficiency Course (ELPC) course to improve spoken and written English.

•The College also offers part time certificate/ diploma courses in French and German Languages.

•Placements : The college has a very good placement record. Many placement cells keep visiting the college looking for the aspirants. The college has around 70% placement record, the institution is well known for the variety of courses and amazing placement record.
The internship record is also very good as many companies come and ask students for internships which they can do while pursuing their respective course too.
The internships are usually summer internships with decent stipends. The placement cells also give very decent package after the college around 4,00,000 PA basic pay at the starting, which is quite impressive.

•Infrastructure : The college's infrastructure is pretty good, we can easily compare it with that of the North campus colleges out there, The college has around 100 classrooms and a library which is fully air conditioned.
The computer labs and the seminar hall are fully air-conditioned too, including the canteen which is quite good. There is A GCR (Girls Common Room) and a BCR (boys common room) too, for hanging out or waiting in between the classes.
The quality of food served in the canteen is also quite good, and the rates are extremely reasonable. The college also has a very big playground which can equip many students and also have a variety of sports to play like cricket, volleyball, football, badminton and much more. The college also has a pretty fast Wi-Fi for internet connectivity among the students.

•Faculty : The faculty is decent and responds well, they're quick to respond and help in every situation. The teachers are very learned and knowledgeable and they teach quite well. The teachers and the staff are very helpful too, they guide and teach very well.

•Other : The college has almost every facility. Its connectivity is also pretty good. It has malls, a metro station, a hospital and a market, all of them in a 2km radius. The college also has ample parking space and inside bike parking too. The college is located very well in the heart of south Delhi and it is very easy to reach there because of its walking distance from the metro station.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNXfQ5hTfEAOWsgAx1azlM5R1lzMeE5cGxCpSNR&fid=0x0:0x7da5055b4b6beb02"],"When":"2021-1-22"},{"Name":"Vishal Sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2d7XJ0kkJ7EuWlkGt8TMl35Y-FC1rLSWphwksMGfiJR9cw3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best college under Delhi University,close to Shaheed Bhagat Singh College","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNlEqCuD9MKcV1FBflu7mzOaf_ROg-aCq0liJlH&fid=0x0:0x7da5055b4b6beb02"],"When":"2024-3-3"},{"Name":"Ram kumar Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0s_0Hcsv-jQkiVz4xXs1-yYnOaznbdgMFaQAKmyiYvkxDf_6_ig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Infrastructure is better than some other du colleges and ground is also big.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sourabh Kumar Chaurasia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQjRKmI9cOaIChcytT3ZjiMUBrZRX9VN-43UYJBniV-8u24NK5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The environment of this college is very peaceful and good to study...✨","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gurmeet Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSszLhYH7bQGXrhkfkqnTScBmzh5ql_69FP6jJ-ZGc-uHGlCSfTw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The College of Vocational Studies is a constituent & Public college of the University of Delhi. It is a fully university-maintained institution administered by a statutory Governing Body. It embodies the ideal of a public-funded higher educational institution with an emphasis on inclusivity, integration, quality, and social equality. Professors are very supportive of the students. This was my study center of University Of Delhi !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPode4sa7NBdTZ9X8ql6tx2daCd82-xXlIuTBL0&fid=0x0:0x469bcb8c1b03b6f6"],"When":"2024-8-29"},{"Name":"Harsh Mehra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9k4x0q_BctAwEHc7yiFt0ogeTfmgAziDIaFtCY8rC2JXtDgDz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an unforgettable experience at Ramanujan College during their flagship event, Consultrix, which happened to fall on my birthday. The day started with excitement as my friends and I were eager to compete. Upon entering the campus, we were warmly welcomed and guided by the students, who handed me an event ID card and made sure I knew where to go.

However, the campus is so vast that I ended up getting lost. Luckily, when I asked for help, a kind student didn’t just give me directions—he personally walked me to the competition room. Once I joined my friends, I was thrilled to see students from various colleges, all geared up for the challenge.

The competition had three intense rounds. While we cleared the first two easily, the final round was particularly challenging, focusing on finance and equity research. After a solid 15 minutes of strategizing, we gave it our all—and to my absolute joy, we bagged first place in Shasn: The Political Challenge!

The day didn’t end there. After a much-needed lunch break, we participated in other competitions like Equity Acquity (Equity Research), Concord 3.0 (Case Study Challenge), and Inkvasion (Article Writing). Unbelievably, we won first place in all of them! It was the perfect birthday celebration, filled with victories and incredible memories shared with friends.

Special thanks to Samdisha Kapoor from Ramanujan College, who was extremely helpful and guided me throughout the event. Her kindness truly added to the wonderful experience.

This day at Ramanujan College will always hold a special place in my heart!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNhUBzrf9ha1FBpo2U9NnW7anPD4G_b2r-1kADu&fid=0x0:0x469bcb8c1b03b6f6"],"When":"2024-9-13"},{"Name":"Prajjwal Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1iO2ynxRwc8IA34xBzy5Cq35bIkhRp2d73l-ntSxd67Uhx3c=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"1)Being a commerce student (B.Com) i have to say the faculty is if not the best but one of the best in Delhi university.

Here's why it's a great choice for students:

* Strong Academics: ANDC excels in science courses( Best in Delhi) , while also offering some language and commerce options. The faculty is renowned for their knowledge and helpfulness. There are least political activity only focus in academics.

* Vibrant Campus Life: Beyond academics, ANDC fosters a lively campus culture. Participate in theatre (Dhwani), music/dance (Dhun), debate societies, or departmental clubs. Explore research opportunities through science research societies and SPIC MACAY.

* Excellent Facilities: The college provides old (school like ) but  well-maintained infrastructure, including a well-stocked library, air-conditioned reading rooms, separate common rooms for girls, and a sports complex.

* Entrepreneurship & Research: ANDC offers a unique opportunity to hone your entrepreneurial skills through labs and summer research facilities.(ELITE)

* Accessibility & Affordability: The college is conveniently located near Govind Puri and Kalkaji Metro Stations, with affordable canteen options. The fees are much lower compared to other colleges.

Pov :-  Old Negative review is correct according to old times but now the college has changed .And finally it is my college with good people and I proud of It.............","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPaO7hPm1lAgxkIIp7wtgr5KjnWg5Id5jteAd1P&fid=0x0:0xf522d7e9ce85de17"],"When":"2024-5-2"},{"Name":"SHRUTI KUMAR","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXR3kTQIZbkyPuF5Xeo1a7N8D0XEL1pwkMsnfi9NhBg7tMbled6BQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don't know for regular college, but for ignou, not a good center. The placement cell ensures excellent career preparation through training, mock interviews, and internships with reputed companies. Overall, JIMS Vasant Kunj-II is an excellent choice for students seeking quality education and career opportunities.

Students praise the university's curriculum, saying it's great for teaching real-life skills, and the teaching methods are highly professional . The faculty members are also commended for being excellent, with many holding doctorate degrees .
*Campus Life*
The university offers a peaceful and natural vibe, with well-constructed infrastructure, including classrooms, laboratories, and sports grounds . Students can enjoy facilities like Wi-Fi, libraries, canteens, hostels, and medical centers. The campus also features a mosque and a cricket stadium.
*Scholarships and Financial Aid*
Jamia Hamdard University provides various scholarships to students based on academic performance and family income . Some notable scholarships include the Hamdard National Foundation Scholarship and the Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Ajemri merit-cum-means Scholarship.
*Rankings and Accolades*
The university has ranked 37th in the NIRF Overall Rankings for 2020 and 64th in 2021 . It has also secured the top spot in the pharmacy category of the NIRF rankings for 2021.
*Admissions*
Admissions to Jamia Hamdard University are based on entrance exams, individual interviews, and group discussions. Students can apply through the university's admission portal.
*Placement*
The university has a good placement record, with companies like Tech Mahindra and Tata Consultancy visiting the campus . The average package ranges from 4 to 6 lakhs per annum.

Overall, Jamia Hamdard University seems like a great option for students looking for a well-rounded education and promising career prospects.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joginder Chaudhary","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVi-9uuugGubjKHyNlRfzIYOd2NliRPxZ-2Y97Rfsm_n0Ti-Ofj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the 1st rank university according to NIRF in pharmacy and all technical courses are also available here. I applied for Hungary student visa in Nov 2021 through them. Before applying, they assured me that the visa would come within 3 months. I also believed it because the file was strong and the PTE score had 7 bands. After I applied in November, they gave me the admission letter in January 2022 The fee was approximately 7000 euros I paid it on time.

Now after this they started making fun of us. These people did not live up to what they had said. Because it had been 7 months since the file was applied and he had not got the embassy appointment. And after that the offer letter i.e. admission letter expired. After that they applied again, which again took 3 months to come.

they gave admission letter again in the month of December 2022. But they  still hasn't got the embassy appointment. After asking many times, the only thing I heard from them was that they have not got the slot yet, they will get it through the college.

After being tired and patient, got embassy appointment on 19th May. 2023 When I went for the embassy interview, there were total 10 students from my college there, this boosted my morale and made the interview good. By the time the interview was over and the file had been submitted, I had spent Rs 25,000. On it.

I had taken the contact details of those 10 students as a help. I had taken the contact details of those 10 students as a help.

After the file is submitted, it takes 90 days for the result to come. Result came after 82 days . Seeing this I was shocked and felt dizzy and fell on the ground.

They returned the file by putting a rejection stamp in my passport and giving a reason.

They told me the reason that the university is not registered (unauthorized )and the address you mentioned is not there. It’s not valid anymore.

Despite having student VISA and strong file for a visa, I waited for more than 2 years and got a refusal due to their mistake and incomplete information And you all will be surprised to know that those 10 students also got rejection.

Now I have to cry for fee refund also They are saying that it will take 75 days for the fees to come. Am really shocked. These people did a big scam with me

You are requested to beware of such lies and if this has happened to you then take recourse to the law.

Established under the aegis of the Council of Architecture, the college is renowned for its commitment to nurturing creative and skilled architects.

The college's academic programs are designed to provide a comprehensive understanding of architecture, emphasizing design thinking, sustainability, and a holistic approach to the built environment. The curriculum combines theoretical knowledge with practical applications, ensuring that students are well-prepared for the challenges of the architectural profession. The faculty, consisting of experienced architects and educators, plays a pivotal role in guiding students through their academic and creative endeavors.

The campus of Vastu Kala Academy is situated in the heart of New Delhi, providing students with exposure to the rich architectural heritage of the city. The college's infrastructure includes well-equipped design studios, workshops, and laboratories, fostering an environment conducive to creativity and innovation.

Vastu Kala Academy actively engages students in extracurricular activities, design competitions, and collaborative projects to encourage holistic development and practical learning. The college's emphasis on research and exploration in the field of architecture is evident through its participation in academic conferences, research publications, and design exhibitions.

The college's alumni, many of whom have made significant contributions to the field of architecture, attest to the quality of education imparted by Vastu Kala Academy. As a center of excellence, the college continues to shape the future of architecture in India, producing graduates equipped with both the knowledge and skills necessary for successful and impactful careers in the field.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Abhishek Aggarwal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlOViNRMUbspRtt4G8Y6cEG_98FH2m9v7qnWFG9JU_s0LdJtb0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"College is pretty awesome.

[{"Name":"Chintu Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-qTEpnUFTx8oZkdiijD3JRgXt-5esGo52PFgB6sf68K4ApK0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University (DIPSAR) is a prestigious institution located in New Delhi, known for its excellent academic programs and research in pharmaceutical sciences. The campus is spacious, with modern infrastructure, well-equipped laboratories, and a rich library that caters to students and faculty alike. The teaching staff is experienced and highly knowledgeable, ensuring a high standard of education. Students receive hands-on training and are encouraged to participate in various research projects.

One of the highlights of DIPSAR is its strong industry connections, which helps in providing ample internship and job opportunities. The campus also hosts various extracurricular activities, contributing to the overall development of the students.

However, like any institution, DIPSAR has room for improvement. Some students feel that the administrative processes could be more streamlined, and occasional delays in communication can be frustrating. Despite these minor issues, the university is a top choice for those pursuing a career in pharmaceutical sciences.

In terms of location, DIPSAR is conveniently situated and well-connected to the rest of Delhi, making it easily accessible. Overall, it’s an excellent place for aspiring pharmacists and researchers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hrishabh Kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-wBWRmm3pxr5dqZh5KRWyOpbzEwLoBMBz-_lsn2wJEyvTfhDNjg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A well known college for pharmaceutical sciences in Asia.

More importantly, a perfect place for all curious and driven human beings who want to make a difference. I pursued PG Diploma in Advertising and PR at SACAC. The admission process is very smooth and extremely riveting for people who want to get their creative juices flowing. Actually, the whole course is enjoyable for such people. I feel the best thing about SACAC's Ad&PR course is that its curriculum is designed in a way that it draws from various disciplines like culture, society, visual communication, design, etc., all of which are very important applied fields in advertising and PR.

The faculty come with a vaste experience in their respective fields and focus greatly on the practical learning of students by giving them assignments, case studies and projects. The management is immensely warm and supportive of students. No other educational institute that I've attended has had faculty and management that actually mentor students. The course will give you the opportunity to interact with renowned professionals in the corporate space ( they could be your lecturers, guest speakers, workshop conductors and/or your programme mentors), shadow a woman CxO during the summers, go on a rural immersion trip and learn about not just management concepts but also many liberal arts subjects and hone your communication and leadership skills—all at the same time !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPm_6vunhrJOMN4mZFYKcWqoD4FBKoJVExAtORr&fid=0x0:0x8667b13ae1773a24"],"When":"2022-11-23"},{"Name":"Varsha Alok","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIL8WlHfTEgBLvBujkyeqkn3xg1t_8RRw2tdzCJAE831qlPRg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Vedica is the unconventional alternative to a traditional MBA and it ensures a holistic development of its scholars in all aspects. The students graduating from here are equipped in management, leadership, and communication skills.

The 18 month progressive curriculum truly lets us emerge as confident and fierce individuals ready to take on any challenges in the work and personal life.

Besides that, Vedica is a fun place to learn and unlearn and in the process make abundant memories and friends for life. I have been a 2019 pass out and can truly vouch for it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dhwani Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGCzGM5msAPNgMHwyNYKTSYuYzziLDfUTazRlowbsJiGsJVMuP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’m currently a student at Vedica and so far I’ve thoroughly enjoyed all the modules, lectures and guest sessions. The curriculum has been specially curated to ensure every scholar is industry ready/ready to take on leadership roles in the field of their choice (for those with more than 4-5 years of work ex.) at the end of the 18-month-long programme. I’m excited to kick-start my interactions with my mentor under the programme mentorship scheme and also look forward to the shadow module scheduled for my batch over the summer break. I highly recommend Vedica to every woman willing to carve a niche for herself in today’s fast-changing world and not afraid of taking an unconventional route towards achieving the same.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNESsHegcACj0Rjg1LqKcOpbcIQJbluNEzYmY71&fid=0x0:0x8667b13ae1773a24"],"When":"2022-11-22"},{"Name":"Rishika Sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXH2RfeMDJLYDq_INMOEsGNvkAtrlU90rbRS0vmAKX4vmLAg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It has been 3 months since I joined vedica and so far my journey is so amazing. Vedica is a place where you can come out of your comfort zone and interact with your peers without having the fear of judgment and see yourself transforming every day.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Puspita Bhunia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDzpj4u4YQKIFj9wKuSqDOhBOtIb1Bx7uvro8t_bwzr_Gp53_b=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was so nervous before joining Vedica thinking about how would I cope up with the changes lying ahead of me. Vedica can definitely lead you to the right path.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Akshaya Gopal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqwK6zVmAV1OxlqKL3n944k2WwceER4FakuMOqVdj78OVS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My journey at Vedica has been nothing short of incredible. It has helped me both professionally and personally. Here goes:

Professionally:
With some background in arts and communication, Vedica’s management track helped me bridge both my worlds. It was a great experience to get a taste of the business world and feed the learner in me from accomplished people in the industry. Starting from the basics to kindling my curiosity further, Vedica did it all!

Personally:
I was in a dilemma on ‘what next in life’. When I saw the website, something inside me told me that this place is going to be life-changing. It truly was. The amount of learning and unlearning has been an eye-opening experience. Right now, I’m positive that wherever I go, my learnings from Vedica would add a holistic touch to whatever I do.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMqyU0DeTB03XV5Yrz2uKK5ltWixjzg9iuZJnk&fid=0x0:0x8667b13ae1773a24"],"When":"2022-11-24"},{"Name":"pragya Laur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVEElp8W3EK1ohPvnYpQs2z5rUu9XNDmUDNgR20Qao1u1Mt2rk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"While looking out for the perfect college for you, you study every tiny detail under a microscope. Most often you'll find yourself relying on student reviews because people prefer to hear things from the horse's mouth. I'm a student of the current batch at Vedica and I can vouch for the exceptional experience that you'll get here in terms of exposure, faculty, workshops, curriculum. Everyday here is full of new learnings and it'll transform you as an individual. So, go for it. Don't give it a second thought ! :)","Images":null,"When":""}]

You can get your study material from here but for some cases like study centre change or any other issues regarding assignments or other stuff they may also refer you to regional centres again as IGNOU is not about study its just a loop to make money from students and find possible ways to just  annoy them enough to feel guilty to take admission here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMxG1Cb3GVF3I22zGKi_3M70bOpk00o33vJOhzc&fid=0x0:0x17e4392a594a1e19"],"When":"2024-12-19"},{"Name":"Manwithoutname","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPy3oW1OahTIePOhEYWol58TOS78YU7USZwzl_WI3CfO-QaRwP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"IGNOU (Indira Gandhi National Open University) in New Delhi is a prominent institution offering a wide range of distance education programs. It is renowned for its flexibility, allowing students from diverse backgrounds to pursue higher education while managing other commitments. The university provides an extensive selection of courses, from undergraduate to doctoral levels, which are accessible to students across India and globally.

One of IGNOU’s strengths is its ability to cater to non-traditional learners through its innovative learning methods and accessible course materials. The university’s robust support systems, including study centers and online resources, are designed to assist students throughout their academic journey.

However, some challenges exist. The quality of study centers and local support can vary significantly, leading to inconsistent experiences for students. Additionally, the administrative processes can be slow and cumbersome, and it can be difficult to get timely responses as phone calls to the university are often unanswered. These issues can frustrate students who need quick resolutions.

It is a co-educational day school known for its academic excellence, holistic development, and global outlook.

Established in 1957, Bluebells School International follows a comprehensive curriculum that combines the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) syllabus with international educational practices. The school offers education from pre-primary to senior secondary levels.

Bluebells School International focuses on providing a well-rounded education that nurtures intellectual, social, emotional, and physical growth. The school encourages critical thinking, creativity, and a sense of global citizenship among its students.

The infrastructure of Bluebells School International includes modern classrooms, science and computer labs, libraries, sports facilities, auditoriums, and dedicated spaces for art and music. The school also offers various clubs, activities, and sports teams to cater to the diverse interests of its students.

The school emphasizes the importance of experiential learning, interdisciplinary studies, and a student-centered approach. It encourages students to engage in co-curricular activities, community service, and international exchange programs to develop a broader perspective and a well-rounded personality.

The faculty at Bluebells School International consists of experienced educators who are dedicated to providing quality education. They employ innovative teaching methodologies and personalized attention to ensure the academic progress and holistic development of each student.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"KRISHNA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeMVQSJoQD2VDLvOhwsFyyuOKlsi8lrIyDD2wh7iuldFuL3ayT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Review of South Campus Metro Station

South Campus Metro Station, situated on the Pink Line of the Delhi Metro, serves as a vital transit point for students, professionals, and residents in the area. Its proximity to the South Campus of Delhi University makes it especially popular among students, providing them with a quick and affordable commute to various parts of the city.

The station's modern design is both functional and aesthetically pleasing. Equipped with escalators, elevators, and clearly marked signage, it ensures ease of navigation for commuters, including those with mobility challenges. The station also features ample lighting and air-conditioned interiors, creating a comfortable environment even during peak hours.

Cleanliness is maintained to a high standard, with regular sanitation of platforms, staircases, and restrooms. Security is robust, with CCTV surveillance and courteous metro staff available to assist passengers. The availability of token vending machines and smart card recharge kiosks minimizes waiting times for ticketing.

An added advantage is its integration with the Delhi Metro feeder bus service, e-rickshaws, and shared auto-rickshaws, ensuring seamless last-mile connectivity. Nearby, one can find numerous eateries and shops catering to budget-conscious students.

However, during peak hours, the station can get crowded due to its strategic location. Better crowd management measures, such as designated queues or additional ticketing counters, could further enhance the commuter experience.

Overall, South Campus Metro Station is a well-maintained and efficiently managed facility that underscores the Delhi Metro's commitment to providing world-class public transportation. It is a vital lifeline for the vibrant student and residential communities it serves.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPB_E1K52YdR4btfuPjOUAVnRUaBoJsW7MbYGIV&fid=0x0:0xcb233b5be1a6409b"],"When":"2024-12-4"},{"Name":"Kajal Rajkumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWB871x5QUCPy9cBxA21YhkS2kKS2SZzXaaylr1I-VnACzYqc-V=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Durgabai Deshmukh South Campus metro station is located on the Pink Line of the Delhi Metro. Aditya sir starts from basic problems and gradually increases the level and soon you will find yourself able to solve previous year questions confidently.

Aditya sir is a little strict but strict teachers are the best. Just follow sir's instructions blindly and your seat in good college is confirmed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Abhinaw Kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgWJIpSVp31X9n1c3d9Eb0LLYuIoXGmKfAW6jMG8iNZjkQnuYi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Aditya sir is one person who was not only my chemistry teacher, but I also see a guide and a brother figure in him.

The enthusiasm and passion that he has for teaching creates an upbeat vibe in the classroom. He always made me feel empowered and motivated me to reach new heights.
Even during the period of lockdown, when the situation was ever so uncertain..sir stood by his students, took online lectures and made us practice JEE level questions as well.
I can assure you that if you blindly follow him and put ALL your trust in him..AIIMS Delhi is yours.

Sir, if you are reading this..just wanted to say thankyou again :)
(Also for all the pizza-burger treats XD)

Regards
Abhinaw
